location.showMoreHint: Can't find your country? Click to show all countries

locationPrompt.description: Choose how you want to determine your location to get accurate prayer times
locationPrompt.changeDescription: Choose how you want to update your location to get accurate prayer times
locationPrompt.noNearbyCity: No nearby city found. Please select location manually.
locationPrompt.permissionDenied: Location access permission denied. Please allow access from browser settings or select location manually.
locationPrompt.positionUnavailable: Location information is currently unavailable. Please check your internet connection or select location manually.
locationPrompt.timeout: Location detection timed out. Please try again or select location manually.
locationPrompt.notSupported: Your browser does not support geolocation. Please select location manually.
locationPrompt.error: An error occurred while detecting location. Please try again or select location manually.
